note: 06-02 full window (57 completed, 84.2% — DOWN from 06-01's 96.2% peak). 9 failures / 3 classes. token-budget-429 RE-ESCALATED (2 wf over cap), safe-output partial-failure-intolerance persists (3 wf), NEW copilot-sdk-session-auth (4 dev-iteration runs / 1 experimental wf). Cost outlier Semantic Function Refactoring $6.35 (success).

anomalies.t: RE-ESCALATED: did NOT recur 06-01 but came back on 2 workflows 06-02, both OVER the 25M cap. Daily Firewall Logs 25.67M/25M (RECURRENCE of the same workflow that failed 05-31) + Smoke Copilot 25.50M/25M (NEW in class, failed at T74 after 14/16 smoke checks). Harness retried 5x (~83-92s each) before giving up. Maps to open #35661. Needs heavy-workflow scope-chunking + harness fail-fast on the maxEffectiveTokensExceeded signature.

3 of 9 failures today, all agent-exit-0 / safe_outputs-job-red. LintMonster update_issue target=triggering not-in-issue-context (RECURRENCE), Smoke Codex set_issue_field 'No issue number available', PR Sous Chef update_pull_request #36353 ERR_API branch-from-base (API-error variant). Variants now span target=*, target=triggering, no-number, transient ERR_API. Root defect unchanged: whole job red on ANY failed item instead of skip-with-warning when >=1 succeeded. Needs partial-failure tolerance + emit-time validation.

NEW: Smoke Copilot SDK failed 4x at agent T0 on feature branch copilot/fix-copilot-sdk-integration — 'Session was not created with authentication info or custom provider' from copilot-sdk sdk-driver on 'sending prompt'. 4 distinct SHAs dispatched over ~3h = active dev iteration on experimental SDK integration, NOT a production regression. Headless server warns 'No COPILOT_CONNECTION_TOKEN set'. Watch-only until the fix lands.

84.2% completion (48/57) — DOWN sharply from 06-01's 96.2% peak (the best in the window). 15-window trend: 85.9 -> 75.6 -> 41.6 -> 81.1 -> 94.7 -> 85.7 -> 90.9 -> 81.0 -> 89.5 -> 91.1 -> 89.8 -> 96.2 -> 84.2. The drop is driven by 3 concurrent classes (429 x2, safe-output x3, copilot-sdk-auth x4). Note the 4 copilot-sdk-auth failures are a single experimental dev-iteration workflow; excluding it, effective success ~90.6% (48/53). 6 runs in-progress at audit time.

Cost top: Semantic Function Refactoring $6.35 / 14.3M eff / 43 turns (SUCCESS) — well above 06-01's flat $2.98 top and the single largest claude run. Then Daily Documentation Healer $2.00, Smoke Claude $1.55. Total $15.05 claude-measured (copilot/codex/gemini/pi/antigravity EstimatedCost=0). Top eff_tok both 429-failures over the 25M cap (Daily Firewall Logs 25.67M, Smoke Copilot 25.22M). Watch Semantic Function Refactoring for recurrence at this magnitude.
